title: Finding elements: querySelector
description: One selector language for finding anything in the DOM.

options: The FIRST element matching the CSS selector, or null
questions.explanation: querySelector returns the first match — or null when nothing matches.

questions.prompt: Which returns ALL matches as a NodeList?
questions.explanation: querySelectorAll — you can iterate with forEach or convert to array with [...].

questions.prompt: What logs when there is NO element with class 'nope'?
questions.explanation: querySelector returns null — check for null before using.
